'''Red Squadron''' was the designation of a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] that adorned their [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]] with crimson paint. The unit was stationed aboard the [[New Republic Fifth Fleet]]'s [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]] ''[[Mandjur]]''. Captain [[Tegett]], commander of the ''Mandjur'', had his personal fighter in Red Squadron, although during the [[Battle of N'zoth]], he stayed on the bridge of the [[Majestic-class heavy cruiser|''Majestic''-class heavy cruiser]] instead of engaging enemies in his personal X-wing.

[[Plat Mallar]], a recovery shuttle pilot stationed aboard the ''Mandjur'', took off in the unmanned X-wing fighter and abandoned his post at the shuttle. Tegett's personal fighter was destroyed when Plat Mallar rammed an enemy [[D-type fighter|suicide fighter]] and saved the ''Mandjur''.

==Appearances==
